case_title: INCISIVE MEDIA SERVICES LIMITED VS. BLEU MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INCISIVE MEDIA SERVICES LIMITED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLEU MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. $56,576.71 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $56,576.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17023036)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
